mapper.select: SELECT un.notification_id, un.user_id, un.message, un.is_read, un.notification_type, un.sender_user_id, u.full_name AS sender_name, un.created_at FROM user_notifications un LEFT JOIN users u ON un.sender_user_id = u.user_id WHERE un.user_id = #{userId} AND un.is_read = false ORDER BY un.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_notifications (user_id, message, notification_type, is_read, sender_user_id, created_at) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{message}, COALESCE(#{notificationType}, 'REMINDER'), false, #{senderUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_notifications SET is_read = true WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = false
